subject: a spectral blue-glowing humanoid figure floating in the sky, holding a curved blade
description: A translucent, blue-glowing humanoid figure floats in a grey sky surrounded by ropes or lines that cross the foreground. The figure appears spectral — partially transparent, with an ethereal glow emanating from its form. It holds a curved blade clearly visible. The figure's posture is upright and watchful. Rocky landmasses and a partially cloudy sky form the background. The overall effect is ghostly and serene rather than threatening.
foreground: spectral glowing humanoid figure holding a curved blade, ropes in foreground
